allow: PowerShell(pwsh -NoProfile -File scripts/repo-id.ps1 -Path . ; "---raw---"; pwsh -NoProfile -File scripts/repo-id.ps1 -Path . -Raw; "---subdir same id---"; pwsh -NoProfile -File scripts/repo-id.ps1 -Path src -Raw; "---nonrepo exit---"; pwsh -NoProfile -File scripts/repo-id.ps1 -Path $env:TEMP -Raw; "exit=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(Import-Module Pester -MinimumVersion 5.5.0; \(Invoke-Pester -Path tests/scripts.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed -PassThru 2>&1 | Out-String\) -split "`n" | Select-String -Pattern 'install-skill|Tests Passed|Tests Failed|\\[-\\]' | Select-Object -First 20)
